arts.ttl: Southampton vs Tottenham - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as under pressure Ange Postecoglou is missing key cavalry for away day to the Saints plus updates from Chelsea vs Brentford
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest team news, updates and live score from the Premier League game of Southampton vs Tottenham and Chelsea vs Brentford.

arts.ttl: 'I was linked with Liverpool and Man Utd – this is why I joined Tottenham instead'
arts.sum: Ryan Sessegnon made a name for himself as a teenager at Fulham and had the opportunity to join Manchester United or Liverpool but had his heart set on Spurs

arts.ttl: Why are Chelsea and Tottenham games kicking off at 7pm today?
arts.sum: There are four games taking place in the Premier League on Sunday

arts.ttl: New Tottenham takeover theory emerges as billionaire Premier League owner hatches plan
arts.sum: Crystal Palace co-owner David Blitzer reportedly wants to take sole control of another Premier League club, with Tottenham Hotspur potentially being available to purchase. The Sun journalist Alan Nixon cites sources in the United States when claiming Blitzer wants to lead a bid to buy another Premier League club, approaching a decade after buying into Palace, reporting that Spurs may be available 'if the deal is right'.

arts.ttl: Wolves sack Gary O'Neil before Tottenham match as Ange Postecoglou action plan impacted
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are now due to take on a Wolverhampton Wanderers team with a new head coach in their final match of the year, after the Midlands outfit sacked Gary O'Neil following their late defeat to Ipswich Town . Tottenham are one of three teams yet to play Wolves this season and are due to do so in their final match of the calendar year.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane names the one Tottenham player he would actually love to bring to Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Imagine the Tottenham star and Harry Kane in the same team again 🥵

arts.ttl: Tottenham lining up move for 18-year-old Argentine prodigy
arts.sum: Preston North End attacker Felipe Rodriguez-Gentile has been linked with a move away from the club. The 18-year-old Argentine attacker is reportedly a target for Premier League clubs like Tottenham Hotspur, Ipswich Town and Nottingham Forest, as per Fichajes. He has previously been linked with heavyweights like Liverpool and Manchester United. Rodriguez-Gentile is highly rated […] The post Tottenham lining up move for 18-year-old Argentine prodigy appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Tottenham drop early quadruple Southampton team news hint as Postecoglou has Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have hinted that Dejan Kulusevski and Dominic Solanke will return to the team at Southampton after their contributions as substitutes against the Rangers. Solanke had played the full 90 minutes in all but one of the team's matches since the November international break, only missing the draw with Fulham due to illness.

arts.ttl: Tottenham looking to raid English club for 25-year-old due to injury crisis
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are one of the clubs looking to sign the Leeds United defender Pascal Struijk. The 25-year-old Dutch international defender has done quite well in the Championship and Tottenham are following him closely. They need to add more depth to their defensive unit and the 25-year-old would be a quality addition.
